assertions.evidence: Verdict: keep ... contrast is earned, not asserted out of nowhere
the prompt states the preceding section already showed how the pelican image and the run log differ
preserves the carrier-versus-process relation without expanding into generic prose
'robust' ... only flagged outside an engineering context. Here it is inside one
every job is leased with a deadline and returned to the queue when the lease expires
Replacing 'robust' with vaguer prestige language would weaken it
it appears inside quotation marks as the object of critique, not as the writer's own framing
The surrounding sentence is itself flagging the phrase as the first thing to cut
Only tighten if clarity improves without hiding the quote
it does not fire merely because something is a list
Each bullet maps a concrete object to a specific role (runbook -> source, SVG -> artifact ...)
add one sentence naming the relation ... only if context is missing
Do not inflate into a generic strategy paragraph about model selection
concrete distinction (smaller model for drafts vs. expensive model for final judgment passes)
add evidence only if the reader needs to be convinced rather than instructed
Verdict: keep ... Here it is the exact point
reclassifies the bug from cache invalidation to data loss
expired sessions can overwrite the newer profile record during replay
the setup has already defined the controlled comparison, so this is earned compression
the three fragments label which variables are held and which is varied
preserves the controlled-variable relation among prompt, seed, and judge
it does not fire on a table that carries real content
Each row names a concrete failure mode ... and a specific behavior change
add a short caption or hinge ... do not convert it into vague prose
the count is functional, not rhetorical
ordered concrete operations of a pipeline (parse the CSV, validate each row ..., write rejected rows)
Do not expand into a generic paragraph about data quality
here it flags a specific irreversible consequence rather than asserting vague significance
deleting the bucket also deletes the retained audit logs
the required action is named (export logs before running the cleanup command)
here it points at named, inspectable trace evidence rather than gesturing at vague significance
attempt 3 fails with ECONNRESET, attempt 4 reuses the checkpoint, the receipt keeps both attempts
Replacing 'highlights' with a broader claim about observability would lose the specificity
runbook style does not need one — the reader executing the step is the actor
retry only the failed step, keep the previous outputs, write the new receipt before summarizing the run
Do not add a named subject or inflate into an explanation of why durable execution matters
the same sentence's 'because' clause names the consequence ... The importance is earned, not asserted
the (order_id, event_id) dedup key and idempotent retries from the upstream provider
Do not strip the explanatory ordering or delete 'important'
here the contrast is the exact point
category shift from a latency optimization to a change in the failure model
the request now completes locally even when the central service is down
Classify as earned compression
these three fragments are labels indexing methodological choices the reader has seen
Do not expand into prose that re-explains methods ... preserving all three terms
